description: Closed-form minimum detectable effect: solve for the smallest standardized effect detectable at a fixed n and target power.
rules: read-only: computes a number, mutates no external state
TEST selects the solver: t_ind, t_paired, t_one, anova, two_proportions, one_proportion, correlation, chi2, linear_regression
pass NOBS1 for per-group tests; NOBS for total-n tests
returns the effect in the test's native units (d, f, h, w, r, f^2)
use this (a sensitivity analysis at the achieved n) instead of post-hoc power for an already-collected sample
usage: Set TEST and a sample size (NOBS1 or NOBS). Optional ALPHA (default 0.05), POWER (default 0.80), ALTERNATIVE, RATIO. Output: mde.json.
limitation: Closed-form only. The MDE is in standardized units; convert back to raw units yourself with the study SD / baseline rate.
